title: Shri Sanjay Lohiya, Secretary, Department of Financial Services, nominated on RBI Central Board
description: The Central Government has nominated Shri Sanjay Lohiya, Secretary, Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance, Government of India as a Director on the Central Board of Reserve Bank of India vice Shri Nagaraju Maddirala. The nomination of Shri Sanjay Lohiya is effective from June 11, 2026 and until further orders. (Brij Raj)            Chief General Manager Press Release: 2026-2027/438
